程序包 com.ifels.controlflex.api

接口 IPlayerStateRegistry

public interface IPlayerStateRegistry
Registry for third-party mod states that can influence ControlFlex behavior.

Bridge mods use this to inform ControlFlex about the state of the mods they bridge. State keys follow the format "modId:stateName", e.g. "epicfight:battle_mode".

Thread safety: setState(java.lang.String, boolean) may be called from any thread; getState(java.lang.String) should be read from the client thread for consistent results.

从以下版本开始:
1.0.0

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    clearState(String stateKey)
    Remove a player state registration entirely.
    boolean
    getState(String stateKey)
    Query a player state.
    void
    setState(String stateKey, boolean active)
    Register or update a player state.

  • 方法详细资料

    • setState

      void setState(String stateKey, boolean active)
      Register or update a player state.
      参数:
      stateKey - the state identifier (e.g., "epicfight:battle_mode")
      active - true if the player is currently in this state

    • getState

      boolean getState(String stateKey)
      Query a player state.

      Note: Returns false for both "not registered" and "registered but inactive" states. Callers cannot distinguish between these two cases.

      参数:
      stateKey - the state identifier
      返回:
      true if active; false if inactive or not registered

    • clearState

      void clearState(String stateKey)
      Remove a player state registration entirely. NOT equivalent to setState(stateKey, false) which keeps the key present with value false.
      参数:
      stateKey - the state identifier to remove
